items.name: Anti Reactor Gun
items.description: A special tool designed to neutralize aurogen-based energy sources. Developed by Neue Zukunft as some kind of "fire extinguisher" capable of initiating an emergency shutdown of aurogen reactors that have gotten out of control. Thanks to the efforts of Kaiser's Friends, it was transformed into a futuristic anti-reactor rifle.

items.name: Artefact Crystal
items.description: A rare crystal – it must be worth something.

items.name: Backpack01
items.description: Your adventure companion: holds everything from guns to treasures!

items.name: Black Box
items.description: Incredibly valuable proof of your victory over someone.

items.name: Boosted Energy Bar
items.description:
A main energy source. A standardized capsule with aurogen that fits most reactors and motor-reactors.
Makes your trampler go really fast for a short time thanks to the modernization of the valve system, which gives the motor-reactor a short burst of extra energy right after the rod is activated.

items.name: Boosted Energy Bar V1
items.description:
A main energy source. A standardized capsule with aurogen that fits most reactors and motor-reactors.
Makes your trampler go pretty fast for a short time thanks to the improved structure of the aurogen, which gives the motor-reactor a short burst of extra energy right after the rod is activated.

items.name: C4 Dynamite
items.description: An incredibly serious argument that can open a lot of doors for you. Make sure to activate it before running away.

items.name: Canned Fish
items.description: An XL-sized can of the famous Sea Deer, an exotic fish discovered by Sophie's first colonists.

items.name: Coin Crown
items.description: The main currency here. Has a familiar face on it.

items.name: Crystal Handles
items.description: A fragment of a strange crystal, ready for transport. Caution – radiation hazard.

items.name: Document Safe
items.description: A safe that contains something very valuable that belonged to the District Officer. Considering how bureaucratic the Austro-Hungarians are, it's probably a bunch of documents.

items.name: Energy Bar
items.description: Your main source of energy. Put it in your reactor to keep the trampler working.

items.name: Explosive Big
items.description: A sea mine cooked up according to a secret Molfar recipe, with the addition of local coral dust, a pinch of aurogen, and a countdown clock. Served inactivated. Once activated, an explosion is inevitable.

items.name: Ficus
items.description: It's a living plant!

items.name: Food Can
items.description: The amount of food on board the trampler determines the number of quick respawns available for the Crew. You also can just eat it to improve your well-being.

items.name: Game Alarm Lock Box Black
items.description: This container is valuable!

items.name: Game Alarm Lock Box Green
items.description: This container is valuable!

items.name: Game Alarm Lock Box Yellow
items.description: This container is valuable!

items.name: Game Key Island Door Black
items.description:
Opens something marked with black. Looks important.
The tag text is decorated with military emblems and states: "Kaiser Fleet's Flagship, The Great _________, Admiral's Quarters".

items.name: Game Key Island Door Blue
items.description:
Opens something marked with blue, but what exactly?
The barely distinguishable text on the tag states the following: "Franz's S_o_age _ut, Me_e__s__g_ fi__in_ vi_l__e".

items.name: Game Key Island Door Fort
items.description: All district officers had this master key. Can open storage rooms in almost any fort.

items.name: Game Key Island Door Green
items.description:
Opens something marked with green, but what exactly?
The barely distinguishable text on the tag states the following: "Chi_f Dis_r_ct Ac_o_nt_nt's Office, K__s__pl__ isla_d".

items.name: Game Key Island Door Red
items.description:
Opens something marked with red, but what exactly?
The barely distinguishable text on the tag states the following: "C__ef I__er_al M__it_ry A_chi__ct's Offi_e, S___n isl__d".

items.name: Game Key Island Door White
items.description:
Opens something marked with white, but what exactly?
The barely distinguishable text on the tag states the following: "F__t I__ri_ Dis_ri_t Of__e_'s Wor___o_p".

items.name: Game Key Locked Box
items.description: Looks suitable for a small lock, like those used on chests or boxes.

items.name: Game Packed Auto Turret T1 Container
items.description:
Some ingenious engineers at the station decided that this twin-barreled anti-aircraft cannon would work perfectly fine against ground targets as well. Because of the old barrel design, the cannon may overheat and jam if it shoots consecutively for too long.
A complete set of spare parts and tools for field assembly and disassembly.

Due to long-term storage in adverse conditions, it is slightly rusted, but can still be used for its intended purpose.

Utilizes 40 mm shells.

items.name: Game Packed Auto Turret T2 Container
items.description:
Some ingenious engineers at the station decided that this twin-barreled anti-aircraft cannon would work perfectly fine against ground targets as well. Because of the old barrel design, the cannon may overheat and jam if it shoots consecutively for too long.
A complete set of spare parts and tools for field assembly and disassembly.

Has signs of active use.

Utilizes 40 mm shells.

items.name: Game Packed Auto Turret T3 Container
items.description:
Some ingenious engineers at the station decided that this twin-barreled anti-aircraft cannon would work perfectly fine against ground targets as well. Because of the old barrel design, the cannon may overheat and jam if it shoots consecutively for too long.
A complete set of spare parts and tools for field assembly and disassembly.

In perfect condition, as if fresh from the factory.

Utilizes 40 mm shells.

items.name: Game Packed Auto Turret T4 Accelerating Container
items.description:
A modified trigger mechanism, experimentation with materials and a little barrel cooling system wizardry, and a regular twin-barreled anti-aircraft gun gained the ability to increase its combat rate of fire from its own heating during firing. Be careful: watch the temperature!
A complete set of spare parts and tools for field assembly and disassembly.

In perfect condition, as if fresh from the laboratory.

Utilizes 40 mm shells.

items.name: Game Packed Shotgun Turret T1 Container
items.description:
A cannon designed for buckshot shells that disperse many small projectiles when fired. The armor plate mounted on the front of the turret will protect the cannon operator from most gunfire. It is highly lethal against infantry at close range. The projectiles are solid enough to deal some damage to structures as well.
A complete set of spare parts and tools for field assembly and disassembly.

Due to long-term storage in adverse conditions, it is slightly rusted, but can still be used for its intended purpose.

Utilizes 70 mm shells.

items.name: Game Packed Shotgun Turret T2 Container
items.description:
A cannon designed for buckshot shells that disperse many small projectiles when fired. The armor plate mounted on the front of the turret will protect the cannon operator from most gunfire. It is highly lethal against infantry at close range. The projectiles are solid enough to deal some damage to structures as well.
A complete set of spare parts and tools for field assembly and disassembly.

Has signs of active use.

Utilizes 70 mm shells.

items.name: Game Packed Shotgun Turret T3 Container
items.description:
A cannon designed for buckshot shells that disperse many small projectiles when fired. The armor plate mounted on the front of the turret will protect the cannon operator from most gunfire. It is highly lethal against infantry at close range. The projectiles are solid enough to deal some damage to structures as well.
A complete set of spare parts and tools for field assembly and disassembly.

In perfect condition, as if fresh from the factory.

Utilizes 70 mm shells.

items.name: Game Packed Shotgun Turret T4 Double Barrel Container
items.displayName: Experimental 2x70 mm Twin Shotgun Cannon Kit
items.description:
One gun is already good, but two is always better. An experimental twin 70 mm shotgun cannon, created by SGOW as an attempt to increase firepower and salvo weight without significantly increasing the dimensions of the turret. Named "Eight" internally for its specific appearance. Manufactured in a limited batch for field testing.
A complete set of spare parts and tools for field assembly and disassembly.

In perfect condition, as if fresh from the factory.

Utilizes 70 mm shells.

items.name: Game Packed Turret T1 Container
items.description:
A naval cannon stripped from Sophie's military fleet tramplers by scavengers. Covers great distances but is quite hard to operate due to its slow rate of fire.
A complete set of spare parts and tools for field assembly and disassembly.

Due to long-term storage in adverse conditions, it is slightly rusted, but can still be used for its intended purpose.

Utilizes 80 mm shells.

items.name: Game Packed Turret T2 Container
items.description:
A naval cannon stripped from Sophie's military fleet tramplers by scavengers. Covers great distances but is quite hard to operate due to its slow rate of fire.
A complete set of spare parts and tools for field assembly and disassembly.

Has signs of active use.

Utilizes 80 mm shells.

items.name: Game Packed Turret T3 Container
items.description:
A naval cannon stripped from Sophie's military fleet tramplers by scavengers. Covers great distances but is quite hard to operate due to its slow rate of fire.
A complete set of spare parts and tools for field assembly and disassembly.

In perfect condition, as if fresh from the factory.

Utilizes 80 mm shells.

items.name: Game Packed Turret T4 Double Barrel Container
items.description: ##Placeholder##

items.name: Game Packed Turret T4 Rail Gun Container
items.description:
A naval cannon, retrofitted in the Neue Zukunft laboratories with an electromagnetic accelerator. It consumes a huge amount of energy, but allows you to forget about ballistics – even standard 80 mm shells receive such a high initial velocity that the cannon literally shoots "on target" at any distance.
A complete set of spare parts and tools for field assembly and disassembly.

In perfect condition, as if fresh from the laboratory.

Utilizes 80 mm shells.

items.name: Grenade Contact
items.description: A single-use hand grenade – or a reusable mace. Fragile. Handle with care.

items.name: Health Emitter
items.description: A portable medical station. When activated, generates a healing field capable of mending wounds and restoring health. A prototype. Short-term action. Will not protect against fatal injuries.

items.name: Med Kit
items.description: Whether it's a critical wound or a small scratch, the MedKit will fix it in no time.

items.name: Old Jacket
items.description: The leather is sturdy enough to save you from a shot or two.

items.name: Old Jacket T2
items.description: A well-worn breastplate, quilted jacket, and stylish belt – it immediately becomes clear that the wearer is not only ready for battle, but has already been through many.

items.name: Old Jacket T3
items.description: The standard armor of combat sailors and field officers of the Kaiser's fleet. The breastplate can reflect even the sun's rays. In it, you will be the most stylish Galician <s>marauder</s> scientist of all! And definitely the most resilient.

items.name: Orbital Strike Gun
items.description: The portable sighting complex "Zeigefinger" of the orbital surveillance system "Bärenjäger" (aka "Berehynia"), developed by Neue Zukunft in cooperation with SGOW to help pioneers explore new worlds. Rumor has it that the system is still present in the orbit of Sophie.

items.name: Pistol Ammo
items.description: Basic ammo used by most small firearms. Manufactured by SGOW.

items.name: Pistol Ammo Armor
items.description: Special ammo used by most small firearms. Its full metal jacket makes it highly effective against armor. Manufactured by SGOW.

items.name: Pistol Ammo Fire
items.description: Special ammo used by most small firearms. Contains highly flammable materials inside. Manufactured by SGOW.

items.name: Pistol Ammo High Velocity
items.description: Special high-velocity ammo used by most small firearms. Its increased powder charge makes bullets fly faster compared to standard ammunition. Manufactured by SGOW.

items.name: Pistol Ammo Toxic
items.description: Special ammo used by most small firearms. Contains highly toxic materials provided by Sophie's Molfars.

items.name: Projectile Amplifier
items.description: A portable amplifier station. When activated, it generates an electromagnetic field. Metal objects that have started moving inside the field receive an additional charge, which, for example, significantly increases the damage from bullets and shells. Initially developed to protect against harmful radiation, in practice, it has also proven useful in a somewhat opposite way.

items.name: Projectile Deflect Shield
items.description: Deflects projectiles in the direction it was pointed when activated. The result of experiments involving aurogen in the mirror-manufacturing process.

items.name: Projectile Sphere Shield
items.description: A portable protection station. When activated, generates a magnetic field designed to slow or even stop any physical objects moving into it at high velocity. Won't stop a human or a trampler, but works well against harsh environmental conditions such as bullets and projectiles. Included in the standard set of pioneer equipment.

items.name: Repair Kit
items.description: If you've noticed that your trampler has more holes than it has walls, this is the right tool to use.

items.name: Repeater Rifle
items.description: The SGOW M82 9 mm revolver rifle. Highly versatile like a Swiss Army knife. Quite slow when it comes to reloading.

items.name: Resource Coral Dust
items.description: Rare subspecies of local coral, additionally cleaned and ground into powder. Widely used in military and pharmaceutical fields.

items.name: Resource Coral Piece
items.description: One of the most common souvenirs brought by tourists from Sophie, it is a fairly valuable resource required in the production of some items.

items.name: Resource Fabric
items.description: Usually a common material, but not in this case: over the years, most local fabric items have either crumbled to dust or are beyond salvage.

items.name: Resource Fabric Scraps
items.description: Various pieces of fabric and leather, mostly remnants of clothing, tents, carpets, curtains and even sails, left long ago in the harsh desert climate. However, some look quite new.

items.name: Resource Gunpowder
items.description: Standard military gunpowder. Not of the best quality due to cheap components, nevertheless sufficient for mass production. Used for most conventional military ammunition.

items.name: Resource High Grade Gunpowder
items.description: The new smokeless gunpowder recipe, discovered on Sophie. The Imperial forces combined their regular gunpowder with coral dust, resulting in a powder that lasted longer and produced much less smoke.

items.name: Resource Leviathan Meat
items.description: The lump of meat of a mysterious creature that lurks beneath the sands. But where's the carcass?

items.name: Resource Leviathan Skin
items.description: A piece of skin that, by its texture, is reminiscent of a snake's skin but, by the looks of it, this piece belonged to something way bigger that a snake.

items.name: Resource Metal Parts
items.description: Various parts – anything made from metal – gathered into one pile.

items.name: Resource Metal Rods
items.description: High-quality metal forged into rods – ready for use and easy to transport.

items.name: Resource Metal T1
items.description: Commonly used parts in heavy-duty machinery.

items.name: Resource Metal T2
items.description: Crucial elements in more sophisticated machinery.

items.name: Resource Metal T3
items.description: These parts were used in the most technological marvels created by the brightest minds of the Empire.

items.name: Resource Mixtures
items.description: Various mixtures, syrups, tinctures and pills that were widely available for practically anyone on Sophie.

items.name: Resource Optic Lenses
items.description: These lenses were used everywhere: from rifle and gun sights to eyeglasses and binoculars. Due to their fragile structure, there are not many left on Sophie, so they are considered very valuable.

items.name: Resource Reinforced Leather Strips
items.description: Strips of leather sewn with fabric are a fairly durable material used to make uniforms, shoulder pads, and body armor for imperial troops.

items.name: Resource Scrapped Ammo
items.description: This ammo will likely blow up in your hands or won't work at all if you try to use it. But the materials from it can still be salvaged and repurposed.

items.name: Resource Threads
items.description: A basic spool of thread used by anyone.

items.name: Resource Weapon Parts
items.description: Receivers, spare barrels, gas tubes and other replaceable parts of regular military weapons.

items.name: Revolver Quick Reload
items.description: A modified 8 mm revolver manufactured by Eisenblut, used by the Sophie Gendarmerie. Received a six-shot drum compatible with speed loading.

items.name: Revolver Quick Reload Eight Shot
items.description: A special modification of the 8 mm revolver manufactured by Eisenblut, used as decoration for personal service to the state, courage and high professionalism. In addition to artistic decoration, the revolver also received an eight-shot drum compatible with speed loading.

items.name: Revolver Small
items.description: One of the cheapest 8 mm revolvers you can find on the grey market. Production – Eisenblut; sales – virtually any arms dealer.

items.name: Revolver Small Dusters
items.description: A six-shot 8 mm revolver made by Eisenblut, improved by Kaiser's Friends for very close combat encounters.

items.name: Rifle Ammo
items.description: Ammo that is used by most infantry rifles. Manufactured by SGOW.

items.name: Rifle Ammo Armor
items.description: Special ammo for basic infantry rifles. Its full metal jacket makes it highly effective against armor. Manufactured by SGOW.

items.name: Rifle Ammo Fire
items.description: Special ammo for basic infantry rifles. Contains highly flammable materials inside. Manufactured by SGOW.

items.name: Rifle Ammo High Velocity
items.description: Special high-velocity ammo for basic infantry rifles. Increased powder charge makes bullets fly faster compared to standard ammunition. Manufactured by SGOW.

items.name: Rifle Ammo Toxic
items.description: Special ammo for basic infantry rifles. Contains highly toxic materials inside. Manufactured by SGOW.

items.name: Rifle Musket
items.description: Shoot, reload, repeat. A very cheap and affordable breech-loading rifle, chambered for 9 mm cartridges. Another link in the evolution of firearms from muzzle-loading muskets to modern rifles.

items.name: Rifle Repeater Aperture
items.description: The SGOW M82 9 mm revolver rifle with a modified aperture sight. Highly versatile like a Swiss Army knife. Quite slow when it comes to reloading. Mounted with the special sights that allow the shooter to cover longer distances with increased accuracy.

items.name: Rocket Launcher
items.description: The Raketenwerfer 1 is one of the secret prototypes built by the Kaiser's SGOW engineers on Sophie. Unfortunately, it never reached Earth -– the entire batch was "lost" during the mass evacuation.

items.name: Rocket Launcher Ammo Armor Piercing
items.description: An unofficial rocket for the RW1 rocket launcher, handmade by someone very resourceful. Packs a punch, but is ineffective against infantry.

items.name: Rocket Launcher Ammo High Explosion
items.description: An unofficial rocket for the RW1 rocket launcher, handmade by someone very resourceful. Not effective against armor, but capable of inflicting significant damage to infantry in a fairly large radius.

items.name: Semi Automatic Pistol
items.description: The O'Donnel "Blitz" 8 mm semi-automatic pistol. Swift and deadly. Highly effective in close quarters. Compensates for its low accuracy with a high fire rate.

items.name: Semi Automatic Pistol Decreased Mag
items.description: The O'Donnel "Blitz" 8 mm semi-automatic pistol. Swift and deadly. A preproduction sample with a reduced capacity magazine capable of holding five rounds.

items.name: Semi Automatic Pistol Increased Mag
items.description: The O'Donnel "Blitz" 8 mm semi-automatic pistol. Swift and deadly. A rare modification with an increased capacity magazine, capable of holding 15 rounds. Even more bullets to miss the target with.

items.name: Shotgun
items.description: The custom O'Donnel 12 GA shotgun that was called the "Pepper Mill" because of it rotating barrels. "Give 'Em Some Pepper!"

items.name: Shotgun Ammo
items.description: Basic buckshot ammo used by all shotguns. Manufactured by SGOW.

items.name: Shotgun Ammo Armor
items.description: Special buckshot ammo used by all shotguns. Bigger pellets make it more effective against armor. Manufactured by SGOW.

items.name: Shotgun Ammo Explosive
items.description: Explosive buckshot ammo. Buckshot pellets are filled with an explosive mixture. Extraordinary efforts led to an impressive result. Manufactured by Kaiser's Friends.

items.name: Shotgun Ammo Fire
items.description: Incendiary buckshot ammo. Buckshot pellets are mixed with highly flammable materials. A prototype made by Neue Zukunft.

items.name: Shotgun Ammo Slug
items.description: Experimental ammunition that uses a single solid bullet instead of buckshot, which significantly increases lethality. Designed for hunting very large animals. Manufactured by SGOW.

items.name: Shotgun Ammo Toxic
items.description: Special buckshot ammo. Buckshot pellets are mixed with highly toxic materials provided by Sophie's Molfars.

items.name: Shotgun Handmade
items.description: A makeshift 12 GA shotgun frequently used by Kaiser's Friends. They call it a "Drobulet" between each other.

items.name: Shotgun Handmade Choke
items.description: A makeshift 12 GA shotgun frequently used by Kaiser's Friends. Additionally equipped with a vertical choke to increase effectiveness against tall and thin targets.

items.name: Shotgun Triplet
items.description: O'Donnell's exclusive 12-gauge shotgun, nicknamed the "Triplet" because it fires in bursts from all three barrels at once. Blows away everything in its path (literally!).

items.name: Shotgun Turret Ammo
items.description: Canister shot that contains a high number of small projectiles. Utilized by shotgun cannons.

items.name: Shotgun Turret Ammo Slug
items.description: Armor-piercing ammunition with a solid shell, designed for use with 70 mm shotgun cannons. It can't compete with 80 mm long-barreled artillery shells, but without those – beggars can't be choosers.

items.name: Small Cannon Ammo
items.description: A smaller-caliber cannon shell utilized by autocannons.

items.name: Small Cannon Ammo Long Range
items.description: A smaller-caliber cannon shell utilized by autocannons. Contains increased powder charge to increase range.

items.name: Small Valuables
items.description: Some valuable knick-knacks left behind by the previous residents during the evacuation.

items.name: Smoke Grenade
items.description: A disposable source of black smoke. Whether it will be a decoy, signal, or disguise is up to you. Handle with care.

items.name: Smokeless Energy Bar
items.description:
A main energy source. A standardized capsule with aurogen that fits most reactors and motor-reactors.
A covert ops version that can cause the motor-reactor to stop emitting visible smoke for quite a long period of time.

items.name: Sniper Rifle
items.description: The Bartka "Petros" 11 mm sniper rifle. Equipped with a telescopic sight. Every shot counts that much more when you only have one shot available.

items.name: Sniper Rifle Ammo
items.description: Basic ammo used by long-range rifles. Manufactured by SGOW.

items.name: Sniper Rifle Ammo High Penetration
items.description: Special armor-piercing ammo with a hardened penetrating core. Used with long-range rifles. Manufactured by SGOW.

items.name: Sniper Rifle Double Barrel
items.description: Bartka's "The Twin" 11 mm double-barreled sniper rifle. Equipped with a telescopic sight. It's always nice to have a second chance. Even if it's rarely needed, given the power of each shot.

items.name: Sniper Rifle Iron Sights
items.description: The Bartka "Petros" 11 mm bolt-action rifle. Simple, reliable, and very accurate. Every shot counts that much more when you only have one shot available.

items.name: Sniper Rifle Iron Sights Silencer
items.description: The Bartka "Petros" 11 mm bolt-action rifle. Simple, reliable, and very accurate. Equipped with a silencer. A handy tool to surprise your opponent with.

items.name: Sniper Rifle Silencer
items.description: The Bartka "Petros" 11 mm sniper rifle. Equipped with a telescopic sight and a silencer. A handy tool to surprise your opponent with.

items.name: Treasure Shovel
items.description: This shovel is in terrible condition and literally falls apart in your hands. However, according to the accounting journals, it seems that funds for its repair and maintenance were regularly allocated by the foreman.

items.name: Turret Ammo
items.description: A regular type of shell utilized by Naval Cannons.

items.name: Turret Ammo High Velocity
items.description: A modification of standard artillery shells, compatible with naval cannons. Increased initial projectile velocity, made possible by a revised powder charge formula.

items.name: Valuable Papers
items.description: These papers might contain some information that can be sold to someone.

items.name: Wine Box
items.description: Wine from Sophie's best vineyards. It is well bought by snobs in Vienna.

items.name: Wok Bomb
items.description: A sea mine cooked up according to a secret Molfar recipe, with the addition of local coral dust, a pinch of aurogen, and a countdown clock. Served inactivated. Once activated, an explosion is inevitable. Extremely powerful!
